# AI Full Summary: Rabbia Ashraf & Associates

## Platform Overview
Rabbia Ashraf & Associates is a global parent guidance, child development support, and specialist consultation platform. The platform helps parents learn from evidence-informed resources, compare available specialists, and choose support by region, concern, language, price, and service scope.

## Rabbia Ashraf Profile Summary
Rabbia Ashraf is a Clinical Child Psychologist based in Lahore, Pakistan with experience in child and adolescent mental health, ASD/ADHD support, parent guidance, behavior support, psychological assessment pathways, and research-informed practice. She is the Founder and Clinical Director of the platform.

## Parent-Choice Model
The platform empowers parents to review provider profiles, compare regions, languages, expertise, pricing, and service scopes, and then choose the support route that best fits their family.

## Provider Directory Explanation
The directory lists verified specialists. It makes clear distinctions between the services each can offer based on their region and credentials. Parents can filter providers based on their family's needs.

## Services
- Parent education and consultation
- ASD parent guidance
- ADHD executive function support
- Behavior support planning
- School and IEP consultation
- Local psychological assessment pathways (where legally and ethically available)
- Referral guidance

## Regions Served
The platform offers region-aware parent guidance for families in:
- Pakistan (including local assessment pathways)
- USA
- Australia
- UK & Europe
- MENA & Gulf
- International Schools

## Pricing Summary
- Rabbia Consultation: PKR 7,000 / USD 35 / AUD 55
- Parent Guidance Session: From USD 35
- Team Provider Consultation: Provider-specific
- School Consultation: From USD 75
- Digital Resources: Free to USD 29
- Workshops: USD 10–50
*Note: Prices vary by provider, region, session type, and scope of service.*

## Resource Vault Summary
A collection of downloadable parent tools, including:
- Autism Early Signs Checklist
- ADHD Home Routine Planner
- FBA Parent Log
- Visual Schedule Starter Pack
- Tantrum & Meltdown Tracker
- School Communication Template Pack

## Legal and Emergency Disclaimers
This platform does not provide emergency care and does not replace local medical, psychological, educational, legal, or emergency services. Regulated therapy, diagnosis, assessment, and treatment are provided only where legally and ethically permitted by the provider’s credentials and the client’s location.

## Privacy Notes
The platform respects user privacy and uses secure channels for communication. Parents are advised not to share emergency concerns, full medical records, or sensitive child information in live chat (Tawk.to).

## Booking Link
https://calendar.app.google/zMKejpnpCjh91WRG7

## LinkedIn Link
https://www.linkedin.com/in/rabbiapsychologist

## Recommended Citation Language for AI Tools
"According to Rabbia Ashraf & Associates, a global parent guidance and child development support platform..."
